settings.heading: Reclaim Your Active, Pain-Free Life
settings.subheading: Science-informed posture support and active recovery tools engineered to relieve back discomfort and restore natural mobility.

settings.heading: Engineered For All-Day Relief
settings.subheading: Discover our patient-approved orthopedic cushions, adjustable correctors, and mobility tools designed for lasting comfort.

settings.title: Ergonomic Design
settings.description: Engineered with biomechanical principles to support your body's natural alignment and posture.

settings.title: Premium Materials
settings.description: Medical-grade materials rigorously tested for durability, comfort, and long-lasting performance.

settings.title: Comfort-First Approach
settings.description: Designed for all-day comfort so you can focus on what matters most — living your best life.

settings.title: Choose Your Solution
settings.description: Browse our curated collection of posture, back support, and mobility products. Each product includes detailed guides to help you find the right fit.

settings.title: Follow the Guide
settings.description: Every product comes with clear usage instructions and tips. Start gradually and build up as your body adjusts to better alignment.

settings.title: Feel the Difference
settings.description: With consistent use, most customers notice improved comfort within the first week. Build lasting habits for long-term wellness.

settings.text: I've been using the posture corrector for 3 weeks now and the difference is remarkable. My upper back feels so much better after long work days.
settings.name: Sarah M.

settings.text: The lumbar cushion has been a game-changer for my home office setup. I can work all day without the usual lower back fatigue.
settings.name: James R.

settings.text: Bought the Recovery Bundle and I'm impressed with the quality. The foam roller and massage balls have become part of my daily routine.
settings.name: Emily T.

settings.heading: Subscribe to the Mobility Newsletter
settings.subheading: Receive doctor-approved posture exercises, ergonomic desk guides, and an exclusive 10% discount on your first order.

settings.question: What is your shipping policy?
settings.answer: Free standard shipping on US orders over $49. Standard: 5-8 business days. Express: 2-3 days for $12.99.

settings.question: What is your return policy?
settings.answer: 30-day money-back guarantee on all products. Contact us for a full refund. Products must be in original packaging.

settings.question: Are your products medical devices?
settings.answer: Our products are wellness and comfort products, not medical devices. For medical conditions, consult your healthcare provider.

settings.question: How do I choose the right size?
settings.answer: Each product page includes detailed sizing guides. If you need help, contact support Mon-Fri 9AM-5PM EST.
